use_cases: Tabbed content navigation in web applications
Segmented control for filtering or category selection
Simple category or format selector in settings pages
Step indicator in multi-step forms or wizards
Language or view mode toggle in dashboards
ai_summary: A minimalist segmented control component using CSS peer selection for tab switching. Features a clean white container with subtle gray border and indigo accent color for the active state. Simple three-option tab group ideal for navigating between content sections or selecting display modes in web applications.
